title: Lower Fire [32x]
description: Lower your fire to enhance visibility!
body:
![Pixelated Text "Lower Fire" written in Style of Minecraft game logo in color of brown and yellow gradient, and small pixelated "32x Resolution" written at just bttom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/692765d249399f06582b183b082ef20e9c7bea91.png)

## About

This resource pack is a Faithful addon which only decrease the height the of fire texture in first person not height of block itself. 

## Requirement

- **NONE!!** But using above Faithful Resource pack will give your more enhance experience.

## Credits

- [Faithful Texture Pack](https://www.faithfulpack.net/) by Faithful Team
- [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack) by [Oculie](https://modrinth.com/user/Oculie) as base for fire block models.
